articles.author: Ivan Mehta
articles.title: OpenAI could be making a phone with AI agents replacing apps - TechCrunch
articles.description: The phone could go in mass production in 2028, an analyst says.
articles.content: There have been plenty of rumors about OpenAI’s hardware plans, which involve launching a pair of earbuds. A new note from industry analyst Ming-Chi Kuo suggests that the AI company might be working … [+2046 chars]
